chapter_title.ar: بَابُ لَيْلَةِ الْمُزْدَلِفَةِ وَ الْوُقُوفِ بِالْمَشْعَرِ وَ الْإِفَاضَةِ مِنْهُ وَ حُدُودِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 167 – The night of Al-Muzdalifa, and the pausing at the (Sacred) Monuments and the departure from it, and its boundary

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/128)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/128)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الرَّكَعَاتِ الَّتِي بَعْدَ الْمَغْرِبِ لَيْلَةَ الْمُزْدَلِفَةِ فَقَالَ صَلِّهَا بَعْدَ الْعِشَاءِ أَرْبَعَ رَكَعَاتٍ .

en.hubeali: Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar, from Safwan, from Ibn Muskan, from Anbasa Bin Mus’ab who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the (Prayer) Cycles which are (to be Prayed) after Al-Maghrib on the night of Al-Muzdalifa. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Pray these after Al-Isha, four Cycles’.
en.sarwar: 2. Abu Ali al-Ash’ariy has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd al-Jabbar from Safwan ibn Muskan from ‘Anbasah ibn Mus’ab who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the Rak‘ats of Salat (prayer) after al-Maghrib during the night of al-Muzdalifah. He (the Imam) said, ‘Perform them after al-‘Isha’ as four Rak‘at.’”
